previewCss: .darma-loader-open-dual-ring{position:relative;display:inline-block;width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:50%;border:5px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#2563eb) 16%,transparent);border-top-color:var(--loader-color,#2563eb);border-bottom-color:var(--loader-secondary-color,#f97316);animation:darma-loader-open-dual-ring-spin var(--loader-speed,.9s) linear infinite}.darma-loader-open-dual-ring:after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:10px;border-radius:inherit;border:4px solid transparent;border-left-color:var(--loader-secondary-color,#f97316);border-right-color:var(--loader-color,#2563eb);animation:darma-loader-open-dual-ring-spin calc(var(--loader-speed,.9s)*1.45) linear infinite reverse}@keyframes darma-loader-open-dual-ring-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}

previewCss: .darma-loader-open-border-spinner{display:inline-block;width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:16px;border:5px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#0ea5e9) 18%,transparent);border-top-color:var(--loader-color,#0ea5e9);border-right-color:var(--loader-secondary-color,#bae6fd);animation:darma-loader-open-border-spinner-turn var(--loader-speed,.95s) cubic-bezier(.65,0,.35,1) infinite}@keyframes darma-loader-open-border-spinner-turn{0%{transform:rotate(0);border-radius:16px}50%{transform:rotate(180deg);border-radius:50%}100%{transform:rotate(360deg);border-radius:16px}}

name: Open Infinity Loop
searchText: open-infinity-loop open infinity loop spinners open-source open-pack-2026 infinity loop spinner html css react cssonly customizable singleelement
previewCss: .darma-loader-open-infinity-loop{position:relative;display:inline-block;width:76px;height:38px}.darma-loader-open-infinity-loop:before,.darma-loader-open-infinity-loop:after{content:"";position:absolute;width:34px;height:34px;border:5px solid transparent;border-top-color:var(--loader-color,#9333ea);border-left-color:var(--loader-secondary-color,#ec4899);border-radius:50%;animation:darma-loader-open-infinity-loop-roll var(--loader-speed,1.15s) linear infinite}.darma-loader-open-infinity-loop:before{left:3px;transform-origin:36px 19px}.darma-loader-open-infinity-loop:after{right:3px;transform-origin:-2px 19px;animation-direction:reverse}@keyframes darma-loader-open-infinity-loop-roll{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}

previewCss: .darma-loader-open-neon-ring{position:relative;display:inline-block;width:68px;height:68px;border-radius:50%;background:conic-gradient(from 0deg,transparent 0 18%,var(--loader-color,#22d3ee) 34%,var(--loader-secondary-color,#a855f7) 54%,transparent 72% 100%);animation:darma-loader-open-neon-ring-spin var(--loader-speed,1.05s) linear infinite;box-shadow:0 0 24px color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#22d3ee) 42%,transparent)}.darma-loader-open-neon-ring:after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:8px;border-radius:inherit;background:var(--loader-bg,#020617)}@keyframes darma-loader-open-neon-ring-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}

previewHtml:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" class="darma-loader-uiverse-radial-dash-clock">
  <g
    stroke-linejoin="round"
    stroke-linecap="round"
    fill-rule="evenodd"
    fill="none"
    stroke-width="1"
    stroke="none"
  >
    <line y2="6" x2="24" y1="2" x1="24"></line>
    <line
      transform="translate(34, 6.679) rotate(30) translate(-34, -6.679)"
      y2="8.679"
      x2="34"
      y1="4.679"
      x1="34"
    ></line>
    <line
      transform="translate(41.321, 14) rotate(60) translate(-41.321, -14)"
      y2="16"
      x2="41.321"
      y1="12"
      x1="41.321"
    ></line>
    <line
      transform="translate(44, 24) rotate(90) translate(-44, -24)"
      y2="26"
      x2="44"
      y1="22"
      x1="44"
    ></line>
    <line
      transform="translate(41.321, 34) rotate(120) translate(-41.321, -34)"
      y2="36"
      x2="41.321"
      y1="32"
      x1="41.321"
    ></line>
    <line
      transform="translate(34, 41.321) rotate(150) translate(-34, -41.321)"
      y2="43.321"
      x2="34"
      y1="39.321"
      x1="34"
    ></line>
    <line
      transform="translate(24, 44) rotate(180) translate(-24, -44)"
      y2="46"
      x2="24"
      y1="42"
      x1="24"
    ></line>
    <line
      transform="translate(14, 41.321) rotate(210) translate(-14, -41.321)"
      y2="43.321"
      x2="14"
      y1="39.321"
      x1="14"
    ></line>
    <line
      transform="translate(6.679, 34) rotate(240) translate(-6.679, -34)"
      y2="36"
      x2="6.679"
      y1="32"
      x1="6.679"
    ></line>
    <line
      transform="translate(4, 24) rotate(270) translate(-4, -24)"
      y2="26"
      x2="4"
      y1="22"
      x1="4"
    ></line>
    <line
      transform="translate(6.679, 14) rotate(300) translate(-6.679, -14)"
      y2="16"
      x2="6.679"
      y1="12"
      x1="6.679"
    ></line>
    <line
      transform="translate(14, 6.679) rotate(330) translate(-14, -6.679)"
      y2="8.679"
      x2="14"
      y1="4.679"
      x1="14"
    ></line>
  </g>
</svg>
